name: codex-shark-captain-pet
description: A persistent muscular shark captain pet with sailing and sailor animations.

interface.shortDescription: Sail and code with Reef, the shark captain.
interface.longDescription: Adds Reef, a persistent mature shark captain companion with navigation, sailor-work, rest, feeding, and coding interactions.
interface.defaultPrompt: Summon Reef and show me the shark captain's current status.
